questionHtml: On the diagram, draw two rays to locate the point Q′ on the image that corresponds to point Q on the L shape.
markschemeHtml:
two correct rays coming from Q

locating Q′ below the main axis AND beyond f to the right of lens AND at intercept of rays

Allow any two of the three conventional rays.

meta.title: On the diagram, draw two rays to locate the point Q′ on the image that corresponds to point Q on the L shape.
